scope.repo_mutations: flywheel evidence and bead state only

root_cause.summary: The Nextra docs scaffold produced invalid or unreproducible builds because it mixed Nextra 4 App Router output with stale MDX/theme prop shapes and floating dependency ranges.
observed_failures: MDX HTML comment failed: Unexpected character !
lastUpdated object prop failed typecheck because Nextra 4.6 expects ReactElement
search placeholder object prop failed typecheck because Nextra 4.6 expects ReactNode/Search element
floating Next/React ranges installed Next 16.2.6 + React 19.2.6 and failed prerender through nextra-theme-docs Layout

changes: Generate MDX comments with JSX comment syntax.
Generate lastUpdated as a React element.
Remove stale search object prop and use Nextra default search behavior.
Pin generated scaffold dependencies to the verified Nextra 4.0.0 / Next 15.1.3 / React 19.0.0 combination.

boundary.skill_package_validation: pre-existing warning: package has 58 files, above JSM 50-file limit

next_steps: Clear flywheel-38u3d.2 as the upstream scaffold blocker.
Reactivate flywheel-sjr9e for the actual alpsinsurance/mobile-eats docs run under current cross-repo doctrine.
